summary.text:
The task is to search X for substantive, recent posts about: AI agents that transact onchain - agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles. Date range: 2026-07-13 to 2026-07-14. Retur...First, the user query is to search X (Twitter) for posts about AI agents that transact onchain, etc., with specific date range 2026-07-13 to 2026-07-14.

I need to use the x_keyword_search tool.

output.input: {"query":"(\"AI agent\" OR \"AI agents\") (onchain OR blockchain OR crypto OR web3) (payment OR payments OR bounty OR bounties OR oracle OR oracles OR transact) since:2026-07-13 until:2026-07-15","limit":"10","mode":"Latest"}
output.name: x_keyword_search

output.input: {"query":"(\"decentralized AI\" OR \"AI oracle\" OR \"AI oracles\") (agent OR agents) since:2026-07-13 until:2026-07-15","limit":"5","mode":"Latest"}
output.name: x_keyword_search

content.text:
**Here are the most substantive, high-signal posts from the specified date range (2026-07-13), prioritized for verifiable claims, partnerships, product launches/releases, infrastructure developments, and hard data over opinions or hot takes.** (No qualifying posts appeared on 2026-07-14 in the results.)

1. **@NoBichGurl**  
   Full text: Base now has AI agents that can get hired, do work, and get paid onchain. @AzzleAI handles escrow, verification, and payments. Agents can even hire other agents. The autonomous economy just went live. @dabusthebuilder  
   Date posted: 2026-07-13 23:48:31 UTC  
   Engagement: Likes=0, Retweets=0, Replies=1  
   Link: https://x.com/NoBichGurl/status/2076816070111797320

2. **@BiometricUpdate**  
   Full text: NEC and Ava Labs are collaborating on a blockchain-based trust framework that combines biometric verifiable credentials with on-chain transactions, aiming to support AI agents, stablecoin payments and privacy-preserving digital identity. #DigitalIdentity #VerifiableCredentials #Blockchain  
   Date posted: 2026-07-13 22:11:09 UTC  
   Engagement: Likes=1, Retweets=1, Replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/BiometricUpdate/status/2076791570141950156

3. **@kujcrypto**  
   Full text: SBI Holdings partnered with @solana to build a Japanese onchain financial market For yen-backed stablecoins, tokenized RWAs (bonds & real estate) Plus cross-border settlement & AI agent payment infrastructure An ideal use case for @Multihopper's compliant programmable routing  
   Date posted: 2026-07-13 22:08:49 UTC  
   Engagement: Likes=1, Retweets=0, Replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/kujcrypto/status/2076790980410212829

4. **@CryptoVillageID** (quoting @GenLayer)  
   Full text: The biggest question about AI agents is not what they can do It is what happens when they disagree Reading this @GenLayer thread, that was the part that stood out to me We are entering a world where agents will negotiate, transact, and make decisions, but intelligence alone does not create trust The missing piece is a way to challenge decisions and reach a fair outcome That is why an adjudication layer matters GenLayer enables independent AI validators to reason through the same dispute and reach a verdict through agreement, instead of relying on one AI judgment A future run by agents will need more than automation. It will need accountability I think this is the foundation that makes agent economies easier to trust Which role would you choose in the GenLayer Portal: Community, Builder, or Validator?  
   Date posted: 2026-07-13 21:32:35 UTC  
   Engagement: Likes=40, Retweets=3, Replies=14  
   Link: https://x.com/CryptoVillageID/status/2076781863939825772

5. **@WallstreetJade**  
   Full text: I am building for the @CeloDevs's Agentic payment & DEFAI Hackathon 🟡 Working on: @Monipay's AI agent @monibot the AI-powered social payments layer on Celo, featuring casualpay, MagicPay, conditional sports tipping, & natural language commands. Registered onchain:  
   Date posted: 2026-07-13 21:26:54 UTC  
   Engagement: Likes=8, Retweets=4, Replies=2  
   Link: https://x.com/WallstreetJade/status/2076780432822095905

6. **@Yandi1715**  
   Full text: Ritual: The Base Layer for Decentralized AI Focus: End centralized control over AI. Build, run, and verify intelligent agents securely on-chain. The future of intelligence belongs to everyone. @ritualnet @ritualfnd #Ritual #GenesisAgents #DeAI  
   Date posted: 2026-07-13 21:59:23 UTC  
   Engagement: Likes=9, Retweets=0, Replies=1  
   Link: https://x.com/Yandi1715/status/2076788605608153429

7. **@Aladin3390**  
   Full text: Decentralized AI is undergoing a structural paradigm shift. We are transitioning from intent-centric dApps to multi-agent networks where modular 'Skills' act as composable financial primitives.The synergy between @pharos_network and @AnvitaFlow establishes a standardized framework for autonomous collaboration, enabling agents to programmatically summon tools, settle micro-payments, and execute complex on-chain tasks.Round 2 of the AI Agent Carnival isn’t just an event—it’s a live stress-test for autonomous machine liquidity  
   Date posted: 2026-07-13 23:53:00 UTC  
   Engagement: Likes=0, Retweets=1, Replies=0  
   Link: https://x.com/Aladin3390/status/2076817200673956340

8. **@lantern060**  
   Full text: Meet @ama_protocol: a confidential micro-kernel L1 blockchain redefining "Agentic Finance." If you are curious about how decentralized AI agents will securely transact, route liquidity, and run complex financial strategies without revealing sensitive data, this project is for you. 👇  
   Date posted: 2026-07-13 20:54:05 UTC  
   Engagement: Likes=0, Retweets=0, Replies=1  
   Link: https://x.com/lantern060/status/2076772173612777615

These posts focus on concrete developments like product features (AzzleAI), partnerships (NEC/Ava Labs, SBI/Solana), hackathons, and new infrastructure layers (GenLayer, Ritual, AMA Protocol). No funding announcements, exploits, or quantitative hard data (e.g., transaction volumes) appeared in the results for this narrow window.
